name: "Your new friends..." - Soups N Friends (SuperiorFox)
description:
🦊🐍| New beginnings, new friends |🦌🐱

• Art by Superiorfox •

Something new?!?!

👤Characters!👤

🦊 Soups Da Fox! 🦊

The Protagonist of it all. Soups is the main man when it comes to the deets on everything in and around the house. Though despite being there person seemingly almost everything revolves around, he doesn't seem all too aware of everything at times. Sure he's not dumb but not even I could call him the exact smartest... no diss.

🐍 Lucy Swallows! 🐍

The lady of the group. Lucy, like said before, is the girl in a house of dicks. If not in the middle of a ... "session" with Soups and everyone, you would see her most in her room, absentmindedly watching anything that tickles her fancy on YouTube. Her tastes varying from goats like MoistCritikal, FuzionZGamer, Markiplier, Joe Bartolozzi Flamingo to more niche things like... 12 Lego building compilation.

🦌 Cain the Deer! 🦌

The nonchalant one. Cain, is the sense of normality in the Soups household. Unlike his energetic friends, Cain hangs back alot when it comes to Soups' ideas and the wacky adventures that comes to their home. Despite his lanky frame, Cain does at times serve as the muscle the gets the rest of his friends out of trouble, though it is rather annoying to be a rather relied on all the time.

🐱 Bob the Cat! 🐱

The weirdo of the group. Bob, despite the feline look is anything bit that, coming from a distant race in the stars. Bob brings all the chaos into the house, his mischievous personality and very much not bright intelligence serving a dangerous combo along with his high libido. Keep watch of him, the guy might be little but that thang on him is anything but...

🏡
creator: 𝓜𝓻𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓜𝓻𝓼𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂
